  • Integrated accelerometer provides incident detection that automatically sends location data to emergency contacts if you need assistance (primarily designed for road use)
  • High-resolution, color 3.5 in. capacitive touch screen works with gloves and even when wet
  • Edge 1030 is compatible with Varia rearview radar and smart bike light to help promote a safe riding environment; Varia sold separately
  • Supports an external heart rate monitor; heart rate chest strap sold separately
  • Delivers up to 20 hrs. of power, or up to 40 hrs. with the optional extended battery pack; external battery pack sold separately
  • Flush mount keeps your device in line with the handlebar, giving your Edge a lower profile than other cycling computers
  • Includes extended out-front mount, standard mount, tether and USB cable

Name: Topeak Mountain TT G Twin Turbo Minipump
